survey.qualityGate: School requirements, case/public evidence, literature shortlist, and material gaps are traceable and recorded.

taskBlueprints.title: Collect school and thesis requirements
taskBlueprints.description: Record school format, word count, citation style, thesis type requirements, advisor constraints, and integrity rules.

taskBlueprints.title: Build the case evidence inventory
taskBlueprints.description: Register annual reports, announcements, inquiry replies, policies, interviews, internal materials, and data gaps with credibility levels.

taskBlueprints.title: Build a thesis-specific literature shortlist
taskBlueprints.description: Collect user-supplied and verifiable literature tied to the research problem, theory, method, and case context.

ideation.qualityGate: A lead topic is selected only after real problem visibility, accounting relevance, evidence boundary, case design, and provisional answer pass review.

taskBlueprints.title: Generate MPAcc candidate topics
taskBlueprints.description: Turn survey materials into 2-4 candidate topics with real observation, research question, provisional answer, case design, and evidence boundary.

taskBlueprints.title: Stress-test topic gates
taskBlueprints.description: Reject or revise topics that rely on invented concepts, reconstructed indicators, data-direction conflict, causal identities, or unverifiable core claims.

taskBlueprints.title: Select and record the lead topic
taskBlueprints.description: Confirm the selected topic with the user and record discarded alternatives, evidence boundary, and repair moves.

experiment.qualityGate: Evidence, method, and case design can support the research question without fabricated data or method-label decoration.

taskBlueprints.title: Build the evidence matrix
taskBlueprints.description: Map each claim to direct evidence, reasonable inference, unavailable internal-data limits, and missing materials.

taskBlueprints.title: Check method-data fit
taskBlueprints.description: Verify that any AHP, fsQCA, event study, text analysis, KRI, model, or case comparison has the required input data and management meaning.

taskBlueprints.title: Design case analysis and solution logic
taskBlueprints.description: Build the problem-cause-solution or mechanism/effect chain that will drive the outline and later chapters.

publication.qualityGate: Proposal or thesis draft is aligned with topic gate, evidence matrix, citation plan, and MPAcc quality checklist.

taskBlueprints.title: Draft the opening report or thesis outline
taskBlueprints.description: Translate the selected topic, evidence boundary, literature plan, and case design into an opening report or chapter outline.

taskBlueprints.title: Draft or revise thesis chapters
taskBlueprints.description: Write chapters as connected work packages with placeholders for missing facts and citations tied to claims.

taskBlueprints.title: Audit citations and MPAcc quality gates
taskBlueprints.description: Check citation integrity, topic-problem-method alignment, evidence boundaries, and problem-cause-solution traceability.

promotion.qualityGate: Defense materials answer the research question, anticipate methodological and evidence challenges, and disclose limitations honestly.

taskBlueprints.title: Prepare defense Q&A
taskBlueprints.description: Generate likely defense questions and answer points from the confirmed draft, evidence boundaries, and limitations.

taskBlueprints.title: Prepare defense outline or slides
taskBlueprints.description: Convert the thesis into a concise defense narrative covering problem, evidence, method, findings, solution, contribution, and limitations.
